name: pi-fast-context
description: Pi extension package that registers native Fast Context tools powered by Windsurf Devstral semantic code search.

scripts.check:lib: node --check src/lib/core.mjs && node --check src/lib/executor.mjs && node --check src/lib/extract-key.mjs && node --check src/lib/protobuf.mjs && node --check src/lib/directory-scorer.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run check:lib
